title: Dekton 5 PC B & D Type Jigsaw Blade Set | Includes 75mm & 50mm HCS Blades | Ideal for Wood & Plastic | Assorted for Fast, Clean Cuts | Compatible with Decker, Ryobi, Hitachi, Makita, Stanley & More
features: Versatile Cutting: This 5-piece jigsaw blade set is designed for cutting through wood and plastic with ease. The assortment includes blades of varying sizes for a range of applications, ensuring fast and clean cuts for different projects.

Durable Construction: Each blade is crafted from extra-strong High Carbon Steel (HCS), providing long-lasting durability and resistance to wear. The robust build ensures reliable performance even under heavy use.

B & D-Style Fitting: The blades feature a B & D-Style fitting, which is compatible with popular jigsaw brands such as Decker, Ryobi, Hitachi, Makita, Stanley & more. This universal fitting ensures that the blades can be used with a wide range of jigsaw tools.

Assorted Blade Sizes: The set includes both 75mm and 50mm blades, offering versatility for different cutting depths and requirements. This assortment makes it easier to tackle a variety of projects with precision.

Easy Installation: The blades are designed for quick and hassle-free installation. The B & D-Style fitting ensures a secure connection with your jigsaw, allowing for smooth operation and reducing the risk of blade slippage during use.
description: The Dekton 5 PC B & D-Type Jigsaw Blade Set is your go-to solution for precision cutting in wood and plastic. This set includes five high-quality blades, featuring both 75mm and 50mm options to suit various cutting depths and applications. Crafted from extra-strong High Carbon Steel (HCS), these blades offer exceptional durability and performance, ensuring clean and efficient cuts even under demanding conditions. The B & D-Style fitting is compatible with a wide range of jigsaw brands, including Decker, Ryobi, Hitachi, Makita, Stanley & more, making it a versatile addition to your toolkit. Each blade is designed for easy installation and secure fit, providing stable and reliable operation. Whether you're working on DIY projects or professional tasks, this set delivers the versatility and reliability you need for accurate and effective cutting.
